description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, multiple outdoor terraces, and integrated green spaces with palm trees and landscaped gardens. The front includes a driveway leading to a multi-car garage, while the rear showcases a swimming pool and a sunbathing deck. The building's exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with sleek, minimalist lines and a combination of concrete, glass, and metal materials. The interior appears to be open-plan, with visible living, dining, and bedroom areas, as well as outdoor lounge spaces. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living and contemporary architectural aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and multiple terraces, finished in light gray and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped garden with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sunbathing deck, green spaces, and the rear pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, extensive windows, and outdoor living areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the pool, terrace, and additional green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
